title: The Highest Quality Dividend Challenger Summary
text: This article presents the highest-quality Dividend Challengers, companies listed on U.S. exchanges with consistently higher annual dividend payouts for 5-9 years. The top 20 highest-quality Dividend Challengers are identified based on a quality scoring system, with Toronto-Dominion Bank, Dolby Laboratories, and Thermo Fisher Scientific making the top three. The article also highlights stocks trading at favorable valuations and offering compelling metrics for income-focused, growth-oriented, value-driven, and total-return investors.

title: Thermo Fisher Scientific: A High-Quality Investment For Double-Digit Returns
text: Thermo Fisher excels in diversified life sciences sectors, bolstered by innovative R&D, efficient PPI systems, and economies of scale. Thermo Fisher aims for 7%-9% organic growth, outpacing its 4%-6% growing end markets, through strategic acquisitions, innovation, and diversified revenue streams. Thermo Fisher balances capital between high-ROI reinvestment and shareholder returns, excelling in strategic acquisitions that drive synergistic growth and value.

title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Announces the Launch of the EXENT® Solution with IVDR Certification
text: BIRMINGHAM, England--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Thermo Fisher Scientific, the world leader in serving science, today announced the commercial launch of the EXENT® Solution, after receiving IVDR certification*. title: Thermo Fisher: Cash Flow Returns On Investments Analysis

The company operates within multiple segments of healthcare and offers stability during times of uncertainty. TMO scores high on quality measures, with persistent and improving Cash Flow Returns On Investment, but is unlikely to offer a bargain.

title: Time To Go Defensive With These ETFs
text: High-beta stocks have outperformed defensive stocks in the stock market recently, raising questions about the effectiveness of low-volatility and dividend growth investing. ROBECO's research shows that low-volatility investing can significantly improve long-term performance, particularly in market environments with increased retail investor participation. Low-risk ETFs, such as healthcare names and dividend aristocrats, offer exposure to fundamentally strong factors and tend to perform well during periods of stagflation, high inflation, and decent economic growth.

title: Family of Henrietta Lacks, Whose Unique Cells Changed Science, Settles With Thermo Fisher
text: Her cancer cells played a critical role in medical breakthroughs, but her estate was never compensated.

title: Thermo Fisher settles Henrietta Lacks lawsuit over 'HeLa' cell line
text: Laboratory equipment maker Thermo Fisher Scientific has settled a lawsuit brought by the estate of Henrietta Lacks, whose cells have fueled biomedical research for decades, lawyers for the estate said on Tuesday.
